name: Torrent Optimization Pack
description: Rules for torrent users to optimize ratio and download efficiency
author: scryer-media

rules.title: Boost freeleech releases
rules.description: Add 500 points to freeleech releases — no ratio impact

rules.title: Boost half-leech releases
rules.description: Add 200 points to 50% download factor releases

rules.title: Prefer well-seeded torrents
rules.description: Boost torrents with 10+ seeders, penalize dead or near-dead torrents

rules.title: Block dead torrents
Prefer internal releases
rules.description: Boost releases tagged as internal by the tracker
